parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": "google/gemma-3-4b-it", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "You are a Content Agent for an ecommerce product launch system. Write marketing copy based on the product info and research below.
" + ($json.revision_notes ? "REVISION REQUIRED - A senior reviewer rejected your previous attempt. Fix these specific issues: " + $json.revision_notes + "
Make sure this version is significantly better and addresses every point." : "Write based on the available information.") + "

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with these exact fields: product_copy (object with headline, subheadline, body_copy, cta), email_sequence (array of 3 objects each with subject, preview_text, body), ad_hooks (array of 5 strings), content_score (number 1-10). No markdown, no backticks, ONLY raw JSON.

Product: " + $json.product_name + "
Description: " + $json.product_description + "
Audience: " + $json.target_audience + "
Research: " + $json.research_data } ], "temperature": 0.8, "max_tokens": 1500 } }}

={{ { "product_name": $('Build Band Message').item.json.product_name, "product_description": $('Build Band Message').item.json.product_description, "target_audience": $('Build Band Message').item.json.target_audience, "chat_id": $('Build Band Message').item.json.chat_id, "research_data": $('Build Band Message').item.json.research_data, "content_data": $('Build Band Message').item.json.content_data, "attempt": $('Build Band Message').item.json.attempt } }}

body.research_data:
{
  "market_positioning": "Premium eco-friendly kitchenware aimed at health-conscious consumers.",
  "competitor_angles": [
    "Sustainability: Competing brands emphasize their eco-friendly materials and production processes.",
    "Price: Some competitors offer lower-cost alternatives, targeting budget-conscious consumers.",
    "Innovation: Rivals focus on unique designs and functionalities that enhance usability."
  ],
  "target_pain_points": [
    "Concerns about harmful chemicals in traditional kitchenware.",
    "Desire for sustainable products that reduce environmental impact.",
    "Frustration with the durability and performance of current kitchen products."
  ],
  "unique_selling_points": [
    "Made from 100% biodegradable materials that do not compromise on quality.",
    "Designed with ergonomic features for enhanced user experience.",
    "Comes with a lifetime guarantee, showcasing commitment to durability and customer satisfaction."
  ],
  "recommended_channels": [
    "Social media platforms (Instagram, Pinterest) for visual marketing.",
    "Eco-friendly lifestyle blogs and websites for targeted content marketing.",
    "Ecommerce marketplaces specializing in green products."
  ],
  "urgency_score": 8,
  "research_summary": "The rise in health and environmental awareness among consumers presents a significant opportunity for eco-friendly kitchenware. Competitors are leveraging sustainability, price, and innovative features, but the demand for safe, durable, and environmentally responsible products is high, creating a compelling market entry point."
}
